decoder_heading: PRIVACY POLICY
ident_heading: PRIVACY POLICY
heading_content_part: This document is a disclosure from Hecorat Global Technology Joint Stock Company ("we", "our", or "us") to help you understand what information we collect and how we use it. Your privacy is very important to us and we treat your privacy very seriously. By accessing or using our application, you agree to the terms of this privacy policy. Over, we are pleased to offer you access to this mobile application AZ Screen Recorder - Video Recorder, Livestream (together, the "Application"). Your use of the Application is subject to the terms set forth in this Privacy Policy and any other terms we may provide you.
